meaning: n.卡累利阿人[语]adj.卡累利阿[人]的
examples: The egg is made out of Karelian birch panels set in a gold frame.
The brunt of the russian attack fell at first upon the frontier defences of the finns in the karelian isthmus .
However, the Karelian Birch egg was the only one to use an organic substance (wood) as a primary construction element.
He encounters a Karelian witch, a Siberian shaman and wild horses in the Altai mountains.
